Class Sudoku

java.lang.Object
sudokusolver.sudoku.Sudoku
public class Sudoku extends Object
Represents a complete Sudoku puzzle instance, serving as the main entry point and orchestrator for puzzle configuration and solving.

This class acts as a Facade over the underlying Board and registered SudokuRules. It is responsible for bridging the puzzle's domain data with the low-level CSPSolver by compiling the grid state and custom rules into a CSPProblem.

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    final List<SudokuRule>
    rules
    The active list of rules applied to this puzzle instance.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Sudoku(String text)
    Constructs a Sudoku instance from an ASCII-art string with an empty rules list and upper number limit set to 9.
    Sudoku(String text, int maxNumber)
    Constructs a Sudoku instance from an ASCII-art string with an empty rules list.
    Sudoku(String text, int maxNumber, List<SudokuRule> rules)
    Constructs a Sudoku instance by parsing an ASCII-art string.
    Sudoku(Board board)
    Constructs a Sudoku instance with upper number limit set to 9 and an empty rules list.
    Sudoku(Board board, int maxNumber)
    Constructs a Sudoku instance with an empty rules list.
    Sudoku(Board board, int maxNumber, List<SudokuRule> rules)
    Constructs a Sudoku instance with given board, max allowed value, and rules.

    Finds solutions (max 2) to this Sudoku puzzle by compiling it into a CSPProblem, invoking the CSPSolver and translating the resulting variable assignments back into Board objects.

  • Field Details

    • rules

      public final List<SudokuRule> rules
      The active list of rules applied to this puzzle instance.

  • Constructor Details

    • Sudoku

      public Sudoku(Board board, int maxNumber, List<SudokuRule> rules)
      Constructs a Sudoku instance with given board, max allowed value, and rules.
      Parameters:
      board - the initialized grid model
      maxNumber - the upper number limit for valid values
      rules - the initial list of rules to register
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the board contains any assigned value greater than maxNumber

    • Sudoku

      public Sudoku(Board board, int maxNumber)
      Constructs a Sudoku instance with an empty rules list.
      Parameters:
      board - the initialized grid model
      maxNumber - the upper number limit for valid values
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the board contains any assigned value greater than maxNumber

    • Sudoku

      public Sudoku(String text, int maxNumber, List<SudokuRule> rules)
      Constructs a Sudoku instance by parsing an ASCII-art string.
      Parameters:
      text - the String representation of the puzzle grid
      maxNumber - the upper number limit for valid values
      rules - the initial list of variation rules to register
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the board contains any assigned value greater than maxNumber

    • Sudoku

      public Sudoku(String text, int maxNumber)
      Constructs a Sudoku instance from an ASCII-art string with an empty rules list.
      Parameters:
      text - the String representation of the puzzle grid
      maxNumber - the upper number limit for valid values
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the board contains any assigned value greater than maxNumber

    • Sudoku

      public Sudoku(Board board)
      Constructs a Sudoku instance with upper number limit set to 9 and an empty rules list.
      Parameters:
      board - the initialized grid model
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the board contains any assigned value greater than 9

    • Sudoku

      public Sudoku(String text)
      Constructs a Sudoku instance from an ASCII-art string with an empty rules list and upper number limit set to 9.
      Parameters:
      text - the String representation of the puzzle grid
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the board contains any assigned value greater than 9

  • Method Details

    • getMaxNumber

      public int getMaxNumber()
      Returns the upper number limit for valid values in the puzzle.
      Returns:
      the maximum number allowed in the puzzle

    • setMaxNumber

      public void setMaxNumber(int maxNumber)
      Sets the upper number limit for valid values in the puzzle. If any currently assigned cell value exceeds the new maximum, an exception is thrown and the change is not applied.
      Parameters:
      maxNumber - the new maximum number allowed in the puzzle
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if any assigned cell value exceeds the new maximum

    • addRule

      public void addRule(SudokuRule rule)
      Registers a new rule to apply.
      Parameters:
      rule - the rule to add to the puzzle's active rule list.

    • addRules

      public void addRules(List<SudokuRule> rules)
      Registers multiple new rules to apply.
      Parameters:
      rules - the list of rules to add to the puzzle's active rule list.

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Returns the string representation of the underlying board grid.
      Overrides:
      toString in class Object
      Returns:
      a formatted text representation of the current board state

    • getCellValue

      public int getCellValue(int row, int col)
      Number assigned to given cell, 0 if the cell is unassigned, or -1 if the cell is not involved in the puzzle.
      Parameters:
      row - the target zero-based row index
      col - the target zero-based column index
      Returns:
      the current cell value, or 0 if unassigned

    • getCellValue

      public int getCellValue(Cell cell)
      Number assigned to given cell, 0 if the cell is unassigned, or -1 if the cell is not involved in the puzzle.
      Parameters:
      cell - the target cell
      Returns:
      the current cell value

    • getCells

      public Set<Cell> getCells()
      Returns a set of all cells involved in the puzzle.
      Returns:
      a set of all cells involved in the puzzle

    • buildCSPProblem

      public CSPProblem buildCSPProblem()
      Compiles the Sudoku object into a CSPProblem.

      Compilation Logic:

      1. Create domains for each cell based on the maximum number allowed and whether they are assigned.
      2. Maps cells to variables via Cell.toString().
      3. Iterates through all registered SudokuRule instances, accumulating Constraints generated by their SudokuRule.apply(Sudoku) method.
      Returns:
      a fully populated, immutable CSPProblem ready to be processed by a solver engine

    • solve

      public List<Board> solve(int maxSolutions)
      Finds solutions to this Sudoku puzzle by compiling it into a CSPProblem, invoking the CSPSolver and translating the resulting variable assignments back into Board objects.
      Parameters:
      maxSolutions - the maximum number of solutions to look for
      Returns:
      a list containing Boards with all cells assigned.

    • solve

      public List<Board> solve()
      Finds solutions (max 2) to this Sudoku puzzle by compiling it into a CSPProblem, invoking the CSPSolver and translating the resulting variable assignments back into Board objects.
      Returns:
      a list containing Boards with all cells assigned.
